home.name: Anibal Quintero.
home.tagline: Creating digital experiences on the web

introduction.part3: with experience in developing comprehensive solutions. I am ready to put my skills at the service of your team and contribute to its success.

projects.name: IP Address Tracker
projects.description: Explore locations via IP addresses. Displays geographical information, although its accuracy may vary depending on data availability. Intuitive interface for IP location searches.

projects.name: Rest of Countries
projects.description: I built this page by integrating it with the country API. It offers an intuitive interface to search for and access specific information about each country, ensuring a smooth user experience and a customizable dark mode.

projects.name: Weather Application
projects.description: Developed a weather forecast application called Weather App. In this application, I use data from a weather API to provide accurate and real-time information. With a user-friendly and detailed interface.

projects.name: Rick and Morty
projects.description: Developed a web application centered on the characters of the popular series 'Rick and Morty', providing users with an intuitive platform to explore and obtain detailed information about these characters in an accessible way.

projects.name: Calculator
projects.description: This web calculator is a simple application that I developed using HTML, CSS, and React.js. It offers an intuitive and easy-to-use interface for performing basic mathematical operations, such as addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.

projects.name: Box Shadow Generator
projects.description: Created a CSS shadow generator to easily adjust the offset, blur, spread, and color. With an intuitive interface, you have total control over the style. Facilitates the creation of CSS code for shadows.

projects.name: Pokémon
projects.description: Developed a page that allows users to search for Pokémon by name and type. Also, I offer you the flexibility to adjust the number of Pokémon you want to see on a single page. Find your favorite Pokémon.

projects.name: Advice Generator Application
projects.description: Created this web application with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript as part of a Front-end Mentor challenge. Offers random advice with a click, showcasing my ability to create interactive experiences and work with APIs.

about.title: About

introduction.part1: Hello! My name is Anibal, and I like

experience.part1: My interest in this discipline ignited when I decided to venture into creating my first website self-taught. This experience provided me with valuable knowledge in fundamental technologies such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. Subsequently, I continued my studies at
experience.part3: where I successfully completed my training as a full-stack web developer.

about.focus: I like to focus on the front-end to elevate the quality of the projects I participate in. I have actively collaborated with colleagues, overcoming challenges and solving problems as a team. This experience has strengthened my collaborative skills and promoted continuous learning.

uniqueQualities.description: I demonstrate a strong and consistent commitment to my goals, investing the necessary time and effort to achieve them.

uniqueQualities.title: Limitless Creativity
uniqueQualities.description: I approach each challenge with an open and creative mind, always seeking innovative and maintainable solutions.

uniqueQualities.title: Commitment to Excellence
uniqueQualities.description: I strive to exceed expectations for every project, prioritizing quality and attention to detail at every step of the process.

uniqueQualities.title: Adaptability and Resilience
uniqueQualities.description: In the face of challenges, I remain calm and flexible, finding opportunities amidst adversity and learning from each experience.

uniqueQualities.title: Teamwork Skills
uniqueQualities.description: Valuing collaboration and idea exchange, I positively contribute to teamwork, fostering a supportive and cooperative environment.

uniqueQualities.title: Impeccable Professional Ethics
uniqueQualities.description: I act with integrity in all my professional interactions, prioritizing transparency, honesty, and respect for others.

recommendations.name: Abraham Colina
recommendations.description: It is my pleasure to recommend Anibal Meza Quintero, a graduate of our full-stack web development bootcamp at Academlo. During the program, he demonstrated dedication, strong technical skills, and effective teamwork. He acquired competencies in technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Node.js. His problem-solving abilities and work ethic make him an ideal candidate for web development roles. His outstanding performance and positive attitude are evident in all areas of the program.

recommendations.name: Benjamin Flores
recommendations.description: I was Anibal's React instructor, and I must mention that he demonstrated excellent problem-solving skills and project delivery. His enthusiasm and dedication during learning were remarkable. Additionally, he showed an impressive ability to overcome challenges and a commendable commitment to his work. It is truly inspiring to see his constant motivation to keep improving and growing in his career as a developer.

recommendations.name: Fabiola Rodriguez
recommendations.description: During his time with us, Anibal demonstrated an exceptional commitment to learning and an innate talent for problem-solving in programming. He not only showed a solid mastery of programming languages and relevant technologies, but also a remarkable ability to work in a team and communicate effectively with colleagues and mentors. I am confident that having him as part of your team will positively contribute to the development of your company.

contact.description: I am currently seeking new job opportunities and am open to exploring exciting challenges. If you have an opportunity that you think might fit my profile or simply want to get in touch, I would be delighted to hear from you! My inbox is open, and I look forward to any message you may have for me. Thank you!
contact.callToAction: Don't waste any more time! I'm just a message away on WhatsApp. Let's talk.
